## Summary

- Keeps long-form evaluations in an interim state while narrative synthesis is still missing.
- Changes the interim status above the progress bar to: **Core evaluation complete — narrative synthesis running**.
- Keeps the progress value at **92%**, not 100%, while the long-form synthesis/final package is still being prepared.
- Prevents a stale/high-water progress value from overriding the interim long-form state to 100% before synthesis completion.

## Trust rule enforced

For long-form evaluations, **100% means nothing required remains**. The UI must not say full report ready while narrative synthesis is still incomplete.

## Scope

- UI progress/status rendering only.
- No scoring, prompt, database, pipeline, or artifact-generation behavior changed.

## Follow-up still required

The criterion header layout should still be updated so the left side shows only the criterion name and the far right shows `Score: 8/10 · High confidence`. I kept this PR focused on the progress/readiness trust bug first.
